statement.en: Data Augmentation Application in Deep Learning Drug Discovery by Utilizing Relationships Between Biological and Medical Entities

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a future-dated preprint (April 2026) describing an applied methodology combining data augmentation, deep learning, and biomedical entity relationships. The work is provisionally stated—not yet peer-reviewed or validated. The technical approach (data augmentation + entity relationship modeling) is established, but its specific application to drug discovery and the empirical claims remain unvalidated.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 生物と医学の関係という鏡を通して、希少なデータが無限の化合物へと変容する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの知識の領域が、中核の関係で共鳴し、新しい生命の可能性へと枝分かれする。
